name: Crabagent Trace
description: OpenClaw hooks → opik-openclaw-shaped batches → Collector POST /v1/opik/batch (SQLite opik_* only). Gmail/hook preset agent runs skip message_received; traces rely on before_prompt_build + agent_end. Agents using CLI backends emit no plugin hooks—use an API model for that agent if you need traces without patching OpenClaw.

collectorBaseUrl.description: Crabagent Collector base URL (no trailing slash).

collectorApiKey.description: Bearer / X-API-Key; must match CRABAGENT_API_KEY on collector.

memoryQueueMax.description: Max queued opik batches in memory before oldest dropped.

sampleRateBps.description: LLM trace sampling in basis points (10000 = 100%). Below 10000 skips llm_input trace rows but agent_end can still emit a non-LLM trace from pending/transcript when ingestible.

opikWorkspaceName.description: Opik workspace name stored in opik_threads / opik_traces.

opikProjectName.description: Opik project name stored in opik_threads / opik_traces.

debugLogHooks.description: Hook / queue / flush 调试日志（console.warn）。默认开启；设为 false 或 Env CRABAGENT_TRACE_DEBUG_HOOKS=0|false|no 关闭。

debug.description: Same as debugLogHooks (alias for @cozeloop/openclaw-cozeloop-trace style config).

inboundHookInfoLogs.description: logger.info one line on session_start and message_received. Set false or env CRABAGENT_TRACE_NO_INBOUND_INFO=1 to disable.

mirrorInboundPendingAgentIds.description: Sub-agent ids to mirror message_received pending onto (\x1fagent:<id> aliases). Env: CRABAGENT_TRACE_MIRROR_AGENT_IDS=id1,id2 when openclaw.json cannot set this.

deferredUserMessageFlushMs.description: After inbound message with body: if pending not consumed by llm_input/agent_end within this many ms, emit a non-LLM trace. 0 disables. Env: CRABAGENT_TRACE_DEFERRED_USER_FLUSH_MS.

deferredFlushRequiresOpenClawRoutingKey.description: When true (default), deferred non-LLM flush only runs if a parent agent:… routing sessionKey is present, and uses canonical thread_id (avoids duplicate feishu/oc_ threads). Set false or env CRABAGENT_TRACE_DEFERRED_FLUSH_ALLOW_WITHOUT_ROUTING=1 for legacy behavior.

persistPendingToDisk.description: Persist in-memory trace pending to plugin stateDir (crabagent/pending/) so hook:gmail / isolated runs survive process crash before agent_end.

bridgeOpenClawSessionStore.description: Merge pending onto session keys from OpenClaw sessions.json (same path resolution as coze-openclaw-plugin session-recovery). Env: CRABAGENT_TRACE_NO_SESSION_STORE_BRIDGE=1 to disable.

sessionStoreRouting.description: On llm_input, read agents/<agentId>/sessions/sessions.json and merge SessionEntry (label, levels, tokens) into openclaw_routing when the hook payload has no snapshot. Env: CRABAGENT_TRACE_NO_SESSION_STORE_ROUTING=1 to disable.
